title: SWAGLANDIA 10.0 Official Modpack
description: The official modpack for the SWAGLANDIA 10.0 server
body:
![Image showing the overworld, nether and end with text saying "SWAGLANDIA"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d1e713af745d9fccea8b4f603bec80b6d63d27b.png)


Hello!
This is a modpack focused on exploration, world generation and progression. The pack adds over 10 new biomes, new mobs, new items and even a new dimension! The modpack also aims to add many new bosses as well as revamping the Ender Dragon and wither fights! 
If you want a refresh of Minecraft's exploration system, this modpack is for you! Have fun!

There are some optional resource packs included in the modpack. If you would like to use them, make sure you enable them when you first download the pack. 

Some notable mods installed in this pack:
- The Aether [https://modrinth.com/mod/aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- Better End [https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- Better Nether [https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)

<details>
<summary>DISCLAIMERS</summary>

**DISCLAIMER:** This modpack is intended for use on a private Minecraft server. However, feel free to use this modpack in your own single player worlds or servers! 

**DISCLAIMER:** This modpack includes a lot of mods which may cause performance issues on some PCs. I have tried to add a bunch of performance mods but you may still experience lag. If you do experience lag, I would lower your graphics settings and render distance. 

</details>
